data_sources: Pending: Manual 10-Q extraction for financial details

clinical_programs.next_milestone: Enrollment completion, interim data, topline results

clinical_programs.indication: Extract from filing (likely NSCLC or other solid tumor)

milestone_calendar.why_it_matters: Enrollment completion de-risks trial execution and provides timeline visibility for data readout
milestone_calendar.risk_if_delayed: Extends time to data, may require additional financing

milestone_calendar.why_it_matters: Primary efficacy data on OS/PFS endpoints; potential regulatory filing trigger
Could support additional indications or combination approaches

milestone_calendar.risk_if_delayed: Going concern risk if cash depletes

financial_snapshot.net_cash_used_in_operations: Extract from 10-Q Statement of Cash Flows
financial_snapshot.note: March 2026 offering provided ~$28-32M; need to adjust cash balance post-financing

dilution_timing_risk.sufficient_to_reach_milestone: Unknown - depends on THIO-104 data timing
dilution_timing_risk.phase_3_cost_escalation_risk: High - Phase 3 trials are expensive and can escalate
dilution_timing_risk.may_need_capital_before_data: Likely if THIO-104 data is >12 months out

positive_signals: FDA Fast Track Designation (if confirmed) shows regulatory interest
Phase 3 pivotal trial initiated (demonstrates confidence in Phase 2 data)
NSCLC large addressable market with unmet need
clinical_execution_risks: Phase 3 enrollment may be slow or competitive
Trial sites/geography may affect enrollment speed
COVID-19 or other factors may disrupt trial conduct
trial_design_risks: OS endpoint requires long follow-up time
PFS endpoint may not translate to OS benefit
Sample size assumptions may be underpowered
Interim futility analysis could halt trial early
endpoint_risks: OS is gold standard but takes years to mature
PFS benefit alone may not support approval without OS
Response rates may not meet expectations
Duration of response may be short
safety_tolerability_risks: Adverse events may limit dosing or cause discontinuations
Safety profile may not be competitive vs. alternatives
enrollment_risks: Patient population may be limited by prior lines
Trial may compete with other MAIA trials for resources
competitive_landscape: Multiple approved and pipeline NSCLC therapies
Immunotherapy combinations are standard of care
regulatory_risk: FDA may require additional data beyond Phase 3
Accelerated approval path may not be available
Label may be restricted to narrow population
commercialization_risk: Even if approved, market access uncertain
May require partnership for commercial launch

market_confirmation_watchlist.signal: Stock price vs. March 2026 offering price ($1.50)
market_confirmation_watchlist.why_it_matters: Premium indicates market confidence; discount indicates dilution concern
High volume on positive news = institutional interest; low volume = lack of interest
market_confirmation_watchlist.monitoring_method: Compare volume on 8-K filing dates vs. baseline

market_confirmation_watchlist.why_it_matters: Sustained rallies indicate belief in story; quick sell-offs indicate skepticism
Insider purchases signal confidence; sales may signal concerns
market_confirmation_watchlist.monitoring_method: Monitor Form 4 filings for open-market purchases by executives/directors

market_confirmation_watchlist.why_it_matters: Form 144 notices indicate upcoming insider sales (bearish signal)
market_confirmation_watchlist.monitoring_method: Track Form 144 filings (currently zero for MAIA)

market_confirmation_watchlist.why_it_matters: Hedge fund / asset manager accumulation indicates interest
market_confirmation_watchlist.monitoring_method: Track 13F-HR filings quarterly (requires InfoTable XML parsing)

market_confirmation_watchlist.why_it_matters: Signals dilution risk and cash runway pressure
market_confirmation_watchlist.monitoring_method: Monitor SEC EDGAR for shelf registrations and prospectus supplements

limitations: Clinical program details require manual 10-Q/10-K extraction
Financial snapshot requires parsing of Q1 2026 10-Q filed May 11, 2026
Cash runway scenarios use placeholder values pending actual extraction
Milestone timing is not disclosed by company in most cases
Competitive landscape analysis is high-level only
No primary market data or trading analysis included
